metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  from collections import defaultdict
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
with:
  from collections import defaultdict
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      # Build mappings for mission‑crew relationships to allow combined phrasing
      astronaut_to_mission = {}
      mission_to_astronauts = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
          pred_norm = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if pred_norm == "mission":
              astronaut_to_mission[t.subject] = t.object
          elif pred_norm == "crewmembers":
              mission_to_astronauts[t.subject].append(t.object)
      # Prepare combined crew sentences and mark triples that will be omitted later
      used_triples = set()
      crew_sentences = []
      for mission, members in mission_to_astronauts.items():
          related_astronauts = [subj for subj, m in astronaut_to_mission.items() if m == mission]
          all_astronauts = list(dict.fromkeys(members + related_astronauts))  # preserve order, rem...
          if len(all_astronauts) >= 2:
              names = ", ".join(all_astronauts[:-1]) + " and " + all_astronauts[-1]
              crew_sentences.append(f"Both {names} were crew members of {mission}")
              # Mark the involved triples as used
              for t in triples:
                  if (t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "") == "mission" and t.object == mission) or \
                     (t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "") == "crewmembers" and t.subject == mission):
                      used_triples.add(t)
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "nationality":
              return f"{subj} was {obj}"
with:
  if p == "nationality":
              # Use a more natural expression
              return f"{subj} was a {obj} national"
Change 3: Replace:
  for subj, items in groups.items():
          parts = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in items]
with:
  for subj, items in groups.items():
          # Skip triples that have been incorporated into a combined crew sentence
          parts = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in items if t not in used_triples]
Change 4: Replace:
  return " Also, ".join(sentences) + "."
with:
  # Prepend any combined crew sentences
      if crew_sentences:
          sentences = crew_sentences + sentences
      return " Also, ".join(sentences).strip()
